description: Secure MCP SSH automation server with policy controls, resources, prompts, stdio, and HTTP.
name: io.github.oaslananka/ssh-mcp-pro

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed browser origins for Streamable HTTP clients. Keep this restricted when not using loopback.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_HTTP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Path to a bearer token file. Required for non-loopback HTTP bindings.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Stable HTTPS public /mcp URL. Required for non-loopback HTTP bindings.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_HTTP_PUBLIC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to true only behind a trusted reverse proxy that controls forwarded headers.
environmentVariables.name: SSH_MCP_HTTP_TRUST_PROXY

title: ssh-mcp-pro
